sentences.text: Hans explained that he had to sell many things because winter was very hard for him, and he had no money to buy bread.
He sold the silver buttons from his Sunday coat, then his silver chain, and after that, he sold his big pipe.
Finally, Hans sold his wheelbarrow, but he plans to buy everything back now.
The Miller told Hans that he would give him his wheelbarrow.
